mapper.update:
UPDATE admins
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, phone, user_no, status FROM users ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET ${(pageNum - 1) * pageSize}
SELECT id, username, phone, merchant_no, status FROM merchants ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET ${(pageNum - 1) * pageSize}
